summary: Progress bar line route trace animation map component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/map-route-progress/src/MapRouteProgress.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `MapRouteProgress` and `mapRouteProgressDefaultProps`, then register the `MapRouteProgress` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Map Route Progress Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/map-route-progress to my project. Preserve the exported MapRouteProgressProps API and register the MapRouteProgress composition with the default props.
